title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. guaranum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. guaranum, also known as the guarana hawkweed, is a subspecies of hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of guarana hawkweed include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing potential protection against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of guarana hawkweed include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
